text.tspan: APPLICATION METRICS: numeric time-series describing system behavior
App emits metric u2192 SDK aggregates locally u2192 scrape or push u2192
TSDB stores time-series u2192 query / alert / dashboard
u2022 BOUNDED COST: aggregated; constant rate regardless of traffic
u2022 ALERTABLE: latency_p99 > 2s for 5min u2192 page
u2022 LOW LATENCY: alerts within seconds
WHY NOT ONLY METRICS (need logs/traces too):
u2022 Can't answer 'WHY was that user's request slow?' from metrics alone
rate() function converts to rate per sec
current value, can go up or down
(less flexible than histogram; less used now)
From SRE book ch on monitoring
(detects business issues invisible to tech metrics)
